tests: 215 passed in 0.82s; 0 failures. Pre-existing cp1252 encoding failures in test_gems.py + test_item_bases_manual.py not counted (28 deselected).

questions_processed.question: Dummy needs help — which shield is better (Ancient's Pledge vs buckler), when to switch gear?
questions_processed.improvement_notes: Added gear evaluation heuristic (which X better/best → build_advice), 2 strategy cards (beginner gear evaluation + Ancient's Pledge guide), fixed _compose_answer to not show strong-fact stub when strategy cards provide content.

questions_processed.question: WTH is this rogue merc doing in the pit? Is that normal?
questions_processed.improvement_notes: Added curiosity/observation heuristic (is that normal → general), NPC merc bug strategy card, broadened strategy card search to all intents, added aliases to scoring haystack, changed mechanics_query to always include top strategy card.

questions_processed.question: Which is the best base armor for Enigma?
questions_processed.improvement_notes: Extended gear eval regex to match 'which X best' and 'best base/armor/shield', added Enigma base armor selection strategy card (Mage Plate vs Archon Plate vs Dusk Shroud).

regression_check.notes: Bind demon question still surfaces correct strategy card. Runeword completion question unchanged. Ohm/CTA question still surfaces CTA priority card (#1), with new Enigma base card as supplementary (#3). Monarch question still surfaces item_bases fact + farming strategy card.

review_instructions: No human review required. 3/3 questions passed after 1 improvement each. Benchmark: 21 passed / 0 failed / 5 pending (26 total). Key architectural changes: (1) strategy card search now runs for all intents, (2) aliases field now contributes to scoring, (3) two new intent classifier heuristics (gear eval + curiosity). These are broad changes — monitor for false positives in intent classification on subsequent runs.
